public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of apprentice factor in and around The Starlit Forge, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep The Starlit Forge workable through the obligations of apprentice factor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around The Starlit Forge, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of apprentice factor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Corin Mere will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Corin Mere needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around The Starlit Forge before trust collapses.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Corin Mere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: The Starlit Forge: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Apprentice Factor, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Corin Mere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Apprentice Factor too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Corin Mere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Corin Mere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
